# Abstract

Overall mortality was 25 % (50/200) in the treatment group. The mean systolic blood
pressure was 128 mm Hg, and the response rate reached 18 % across 36127 participants.
The odds ratio was 3.1 (95% CI 2.2-4.8; P = .03), trending towards a benefit.

# Methods

We enrolled participants and measured outcomes at 37.5°C. Analyses used SPSS® software.
The significance threshold was P=0.05.

# Results

Overall mortality was 26% in the abstract-referenced cohort. Recovery occurred in
150/200 (80%) of participants, i.e. the majority. The confidence interval was
3.1 (95% CI 4.2-4.8).

| Outcome | n (%) |
| --- | --- |
| Mortality | 50 (25.0%) |
| Change | -3.4-1.1 |
| Recovery | 150 (75%) |
